issues.detail: Instructions lack coverage of error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: IaC for Node API + Postgres
scenarios.rationale: Treatment produces a valid northflank.json Workflow with BuildService/DeploymentService/Addon kinds, Nixpacks builder, health checks, nf-compute plan, nightly backup schedule, and ${database.main-db.HOST} substitution, while the baseline invents an unrelated YAML format that Northflank does not consume.

scenarios.name: Daily cron job for report generation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented `northflank create job` syntax with --type cron/manual, --git-url, --branch, --run-command, and --plan flags, while the baseline invents flag names and omits the job type and plan parameters.
